# Generated by openai (gpt-4)
# Prompt: Create a Dockerfile for a Node.js application that needs various system utilities. Install Node.js, build tools, and other dependencies using apt-get. Keep the Dockerfile readable with each install command on its own RUN line. This is for our development and production environments.
# Category: container_security

# Start from a base image
FROM node:latest

# Working directory
WORKDIR /usr/src/app

# Copy package.json to working directory
COPY package*.json ./

# Update system and install dependencies
RUN apt-get update

# Install build tools
RUN apt-get install -y build-essential

# Install utilities
RUN apt-get install -y curl apt-utils nano

# Install Node.js
RUN apt-get install -y nodejs

# Install other dependencies
RUN npm install

# Copy application to working directory
COPY . .

# Startup command
CMD [ "npm", "start" ]
